# OWIS

> Open Workspace Intelligence Specification standard.

## Metadata
* Specification Version: v0.1
* Documentation Version: v0.1
* License: MIT License
* Repository: https://github.com/zaditprodakwah/owis

## Navigation Map

### Constitution
* [Project Constitution](/docs/00-CONSTITUTION/Project_Constitution): Vision, core thesis, and principles.
* [Documentation Governance](/docs/00-CONSTITUTION/DOCUMENTATION_GOVERNANCE): Spec lifecycle stages and document control.
* [Architecture Index](/docs/00-CONSTITUTION/ARCHITECTURE_INDEX): Index of all specification files.

### Foundation
* [Document Architecture Specification (DAS)](/docs/01-FOUNDATION/DAS): File layout layer definitions.
* [Core Architecture Specification (CAS)](/docs/01-FOUNDATION/CAS): Ontologies and semantic graph relationships.
* [Reference Architecture Specification (RAS)](/docs/01-FOUNDATION/RAS): Decoupled component outlines.

### Specification
* [Universal Agent Runtime Specification (UARS)](/docs/10-SPEC/UARS): Safe mutation contracts and operational pipeline stages.
* [Workspace Intelligence Report Specification (WIR)](/docs/10-SPEC/WIR): Canonical schema fields and confidence scales.

### Schemas
* [Specification Schemas](/docs/20-SCHEMA/): JSON schemas for validating workspace and runtime intelligence.

### Runtime
* [Reference Runtime](/docs/30-RUNTIME/): Engine for workspace parsing and WIR generation.

### Tooling
* [CLI Tooling](/docs/40-CLI/): Command-line tool wrapper for the OWIS runtime.

### SDK
* [SDK Integration](/docs/50-SDK/): Programmatic Node API bindings and types.
